title: Core authentication (registration, login, session, RBAC, rate limiting)
description: Custom JWT session auth via jose: email/password registration with validation, secure login with HTTP-only cookie sessions, role-based access control (customer/admin/super_admin), and rate limiting on auth endpoints.

inScope: Email/password registration with validation (name, email, password, phone)
Login with credential verification against stored password hash (lib/auth/password.ts)
HTTP-only cookie session using jose JWT, containing user ID and role
Role-based access control: customer, admin, super_admin
Rate limiting on auth endpoints (register, login)

acceptanceCriteria.text: A customer can register with email/password and receive a session
A customer can log in and receive an HTTP-only JWT session cookie
Admin-only routes reject requests from a customer-role session
Repeated failed login attempts are rate-limited
